prompt_text:
### Demographics: 35-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 87.8 kg; Height 167.5 cm; BMI 31.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 272mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 268mg/dL; 3 months ago 242mg/dL; current 263mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.7kg; 9 months ago 87.1kg; 6 months ago 89.3kg; 3 months ago 87.9kg; current 87.8kg), Height (12 months ago 167.5cm; 9 months ago 167.5cm; 6 months ago 167.5cm; 3 months ago 167.5cm; current 167.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 71U/L; 9 months ago 67U/L; 6 months ago 72U/L; 3 months ago 73U/L; current 68U/L), AST (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 54U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 50U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 725mg/g; 9 months ago 777mg/g; 6 months ago 614mg/g; 3 months ago 932mg/g; current 804mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 102mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 102mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 35mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 106mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 120mg/dL; 3 months ago 121mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
